description: Performance: cold index time and warm resolve/localize P50/P95 latency.
notes: cold start: syntax-tier served in 1,349 ms (mode syntax, semantic_pending=1); semantic-ready after a further 22,742 ms (mode partial, semantic_pending=0)
repo eShopOnWeb, index mode partial, 287 files, 2216 symbols
warm localize (25x): P50 2.3 ms, P95 2.9 ms
warm resolve (25x): P50 0.0 ms, P95 0.1 ms
warm find symbol (25x): P50 0.2 ms, P95 0.3 ms
warm impact callers+implementers (25x): P50 0.0 ms, P95 0.0 ms
warm review plan (25x): P50 49.7 ms, P95 66.5 ms
incremental re-index of src/Web/Program.cs (25x): P50 1.9 ms, P95 2.2 ms
note: timings are environment-dependent; incremental re-index updates the file's syntax rows, not cross-file semantic edges.

note: re-measured 2026-07-15 on the current environment after the workspace-discovery fix; eShopOnWeb loads at partial semantic tier (2216 symbols) via tier-1 build capture. Timings are environment-dependent.
